class_features.name: Hauler
class_features.description: Add your Constitution modifier (if positive) to your gear slots.

class_features.name: Weapon Mastery
class_features.description: Choose a type of weapon. You gain +1 to attack and damage rolls with that weapon type. You also add half your level (rounded down) to attack and damage rolls with it.

class_features.name: Grit
class_features.description: Choose Strength or Dexterity. You have advantage on checks using that stat to overcome an opposing physical force.

talents_table.effect: Gain Weapon Mastery with one additional weapon type
+1 to melee and ranged attacks
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution stat
Choose one kind of armor. You get +1 AC from that armor
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Languages
class_features.description: You know either Celestial, Diabolic, or Primordial.

class_features.name: Turn Undead
class_features.description: You know the turn undead spell. It doesn't count toward your number of known spells.

class_features.name: Deity
class_features.description: Choose a god to serve who matches your alignment. You have a holy symbol for your god (it takes up no gear slots).

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast priest spells you know. You know two tier 1 spells of your choice from the priest spell list. Each time you gain a level, you choose new priest spells to learn according to the Priest Spells Known table.

talents_table.effect: Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
+1 to melee or ranged attacks
+1 to priest spellcasting checks
+2 to Strength or Wisdom stat
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Backstab
class_features.description: If you hit a creature who is unaware of your attack, you deal an extra weapon die of damage. Add additional weapon dice of damage equal to half your level (round down).

class_features.name: Thievery
class_features.description: You are adept at thieving skills and have the necessary tools of the trade secreted on your person (they take no gear slots). You are trained in the following tasks and have advantage on any associated checks: climbing, sneaking and hiding, applying disguises, finding and disabling traps, and delicate tasks such as picking pockets and opening locks.

talents_table.effect: Gain advantage on initiative rolls (reroll if duplicate)
Your Backstab deals +1 dice of damage
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Charisma stat
+1 to melee and ranged attacks
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Languages
class_features.description: You know two additional common languages and two rare languages.

class_features.name: Learning Spells
class_features.description: You can permanently learn a wizard spell from a spell scroll by studying it for a day and succeeding on a DC 15 Intelligence check. Whether you succeed or fail, you expend the spell scroll. Spells you learn this way don't count toward your known spells.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast wizard spells you know. You know three tier 1 spells of your choice from the wizard spell list. Each time you gain a level, you choose new wizard spells to learn according to the Wizard Spells Known table.

talents_table.effect: Make 1 random magic item of a type you choose
+2 to Intelligence stat or +1 to wizard spellcasting checks
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
Learn one additional wizard spell of any tier you know
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

name: Evoker

class_features.name: Language
class_features.description: You know an extra language based on your alignment: Celestial (Lawful), Primordial (Neutral), or Diabolic (Chaotic).

class_features.name: Blood Burn
class_features.description: You can cast a lost spell by taking 1d4 unresistable damage per spell tier (this damage cannot be resisted except via evoker talents). You can still cast it even if you rolled a natural 1.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You cast spells using your Constitution stat. The DC is 10 + the spell tier. If you fail a spellcasting check, you cannot recast that spell until you rest. On a natural 1, you lose all spells of that tier until you rest. You cannot use scrolls or wands.

class_features.name: Innate Spells
class_features.description: At even levels, you gain an innate spell from a list based on your alignment: Priest spell list (Lawful), Wizard spell list (Neutral), or Witch spell list (Chaotic).

talents_table.effect: 1/day, spend a luck token to negate blood burn damage
+2 to Constitution stat or +1 to spellcasting checks
Increase the damage die category of one evoker spell by one (maximum once per spell)
Advantage on one innate spell (reroll if none eligible)
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to ability scores

source: Letters from the Dark Vol. 1: Out of Time

name: Trickster

class_features.name: Language
class_features.description: You know Sylvan.

class_features.name: Flabbergast
class_features.description: When you roll initiative for combat, you can cast one spell before the first round starts. Doesn't work if you are surprised.

class_features.name: Prestige
class_features.description: You have advantage on checks related to deception, impersonation, sleight of hand, and misdirection.

class_features.name: Repertoire
class_features.description: Your grasp on fey magic is unpredictable. After you complete a rest, you roll 1d6 for each spell tier you have access to and gain that tier's randomly determined spell from the Spell Repertoire table.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You cast trickster spells using Charisma. The DC is 10 + the spell tier. The critical failure threshold starts at natural 1 and increases by 1 on a success and by 3 on a failure, resetting after a critical fail or rest. On a critical fail, the spell fails, the spell is lost until you rest, and you must roll on the Fey Mishap table for that spell's tier.

talents_table.effect: 1/day, roll a mishap with advantage
+2 to Charisma stat or +1 to trickster spellcasting checks
+2 to checks to maintain focus
+2 to Dexterity or Constitution stat
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

source: Letters from the Dark Vol. 3: Tales of the Fey

class_features.name: Charm
class_features.description: Make a CHA check (1d20 + CHA modifier) vs. the target's WIS score to charm a creature. You can have at most one charmed creature at a time.

class_features.name: Steal Life
class_features.description: Make a melee attack using STR or DEX to bite a creature. You regain HP equal to your level + CON modifier and deal that same amount as damage.

talents_table.effect: When you die, you turn into mist for 24 hours, then dissipate to truly die. While in mist form, Regenerate can restore 1 HP. Mist dissipates in sunlight. Duration increases by 24 hours on reroll.
Alter your appearance to look like any humanoid you have seen. Lasts 1 hour. Duration increases by 1 hour on reroll.
Gain a rat, bat, or raven familiar. You can see and hear through it. AC 5, 1 HP, cannot take part in combat. AC +1 and HP +1 on reroll.
+2 to Charisma stat
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Focused Target
class_features.description: Mark a single target. You have advantage on attacks against that target, but everyone else has advantage on attacks against you.

class_features.name: Relentless Hunter
class_features.description: You have advantage on Intelligence checks to track creatures and navigate.

talents_table.effect: Your Focused Target increases by one additional creature
Choose a creature you can see. You know its exact location while within 5 miles for 24 hours. Duration increases by 24 hours and range by 5 miles on reroll.
+1 to Initiative
+1 to resist Turn Undead
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Battle-Hardened
class_features.description: +1 to melee attack rolls. At level 5, this increases to +2.

class_features.name: Mercenary's Edge
class_features.description: Once per rest, reroll one failed attack roll and take the better result.

talents_table.effect: Gain proficiency with one additional weapon type
+2 to attack rolls
+1d6 HP
+2 AC
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Military Discipline
class_features.description: Advantage on saves vs fear and morale effects.

class_features.name: Formation Fighter
class_features.description: When an ally is within close range of your target, you gain +1 to attack and damage rolls against that target.

talents_table.effect: When you slay a foe, allies within near range gain +1 to their next attack roll
+2 to attack rolls
+1d6 HP
+1 to all saving throws
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Superior Bowmanship
class_features.description: You suffer no penalty for shooting from horseback, while moving, or from an awkward position. You gain +1 to ranged attack rolls.

class_features.name: Dodge Arrows
class_features.description: Once per round, when struck by a ranged attack, make a DEX check (DC 12) to halve the damage.

talents_table.effect: Long bow shots ignore the effects of partial cover
+2 to ranged attack rolls
+1d6 HP
Dodge Arrows DC drops from 12 to 9
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Mounted Warrior
class_features.description: While on horseback, you gain +1 to attack and damage rolls and suffer no armor movement penalties.

class_features.name: Way of the Lance
class_features.description: You deal +1d6 damage with lances. On a natural 19 or 20 while mounted with a lance, the target is knocked prone or off their mount.

class_features.name: Code of Chivalry
class_features.description: Advantage on saves vs fear and charm when defending others. If you knowingly attack an unarmed foe or act dishonorably, lose this benefit until you atone.

talents_table.effect: Way of the Lance: natural 19-20 lance strikes now deal triple damage
+2 to attack rolls
+1d6 HP
Allies within near range gain advantage on saves vs fear
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Demon Death Blow
class_features.description: Once per day, one melee strike automatically bypasses damage immunities and deals maximum damage. Only usable against supernatural creatures, undead, or demons.

class_features.name: Holy Aura
class_features.description: Advantage on saving throws vs magic, fear, and corruption.

class_features.name: Code of Chivalry
class_features.description: Advantage on saves vs fear and charm when defending others. If you knowingly attack an unarmed foe or act dishonorably, lose this benefit until you atone.

talents_table.effect: Demon Death Blow is now usable twice per day
+2 to attack rolls
+1d6 HP
+1 to all saving throws
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Wilderness Expert
class_features.description: Advantage on all tracking, navigation, and survival checks. You can forage food and water for yourself and up to 3 companions each day with an INT check (DC 9).

class_features.name: Hunter's Eye
class_features.description: +1 to attack rolls against targets at near range or farther. At level 5, this increases to +2.

talents_table.effect: Gain a loyal animal companion (wolf, hawk, or dog)
+2 to attack rolls in wilderness terrain
+1d6 HP
Advantage on DEX checks to hide or move silently outdoors
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Light Fingers
class_features.description: Advantage on checks to pick locks, pick pockets, and find or disable traps.

class_features.name: Backstab
class_features.description: When you attack a target that is unaware of you or engaged with another creature, deal +1d6 extra damage.

class_features.name: Guild Contacts
class_features.description: In any settlement, you can seek out a fence, safe house, or criminal contact with a CHA check (DC 12).

talents_table.effect: Once per day, convincingly disguise yourself as a different person for up to 1 hour
Backstab damage increases by +1d6
+1d6 HP
+2 to DEX checks involving stealth or sleight of hand
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Death Strike
class_features.description: Once per day, when you attack a humanoid target that is unaware of you, they must make a CON save (DC 14) or die instantly. On a successful save, they take maximum weapon damage instead.

class_features.name: Professional Killer
class_features.description: +2 to attack rolls against targets that have not yet taken a turn in the current combat.

class_features.name: Poison Mastery
class_features.description: You can apply poison to weapons without risk of accidental self-poisoning. You can identify poisons by sight or smell.

talents_table.effect: Death Strike save DC increases from 14 to 16
+2 to attack rolls
+1d6 HP
+1d6 poison damage on one poisoned weapon per day
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Healing Touch
class_features.description: Once per round, you may touch a creature other than yourself to restore 1d4 HP. This is not a spell and requires no roll.

class_features.name: Exorcism
class_features.description: With 10 minutes of ritual prayer, you force one possessing entity, ghost, or demon to make a WIS save (DC = 10 + your level) or be expelled. On success, it cannot return for 24 hours.

class_features.name: Turn Undead
class_features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol. Undead within near range that can see you must make a WIS save (DC 12) or flee for 1 minute.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You are endowed with divine spellcasting by your deity. You know 2 tier 1 WIS spells at level 1 and learn additional spells as you gain experience.

talents_table.effect: Healing Touch now restores 1d8 HP instead of 1d4
+1 to WIS spellcasting checks
+1d6 HP
Learn one additional spell of any tier you can currently cast
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Dark Healing Touch
class_features.description: Once per round, you may touch a creature other than yourself to restore 1d6 HP. This works on undead as well as the living. No roll required.

class_features.name: Curse
class_features.description: Once per day, one visible target within near range must make a WIS save (DC 12) or suffer -2 to all checks for 1d6 days. Multiple curses stack. You can place one curse per day per level.

class_features.name: Command Dead
class_features.description: Animated undead equal to your level obey your spoken commands while within near range. This requires no roll — they simply comply.

class_features.name: Turn or Command Undead
class_features.description: Present your dark holy symbol. You may choose to repel undead (as Turn Undead, WIS save DC 12 or flee) or to seize control of them (they join your Command Dead count).

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Your deity endows you with dark spellcasting power. You know 2 tier 1 WIS spells at level 1, favoring spells of control, fear, and death.

talents_table.effect: Curse save DC increases from 12 to 14
+1 to WIS spellcasting checks
+1d6 HP
Command Dead range extends from near to far
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Stick Fighting
class_features.description: +1 to attack and damage rolls with staves and spears. On a natural 18-20 with a staff strike, the target is stunned and loses their next action.

class_features.name: Spirit Strike
class_features.description: Once per day, one attack deals triple damage. This inner-spirit strike can only be used against supernatural creatures, demons, elementals, or creatures of magic.

class_features.name: Deep Meditation
class_features.description: Once per rest, spend 10 minutes in meditation to restore 1d6 HP and remove one condition (frightened, poisoned, or cursed).

class_features.name: Unarmed Combat
class_features.description: You can make unarmed strikes dealing 1d4 damage. You are never considered unarmed.

talents_table.effect: Spirit Strike is now usable twice per day
+2 to attack rolls with staves or spears
+1d6 HP
+1 to all saves vs magic, poison, and disease
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

class_features.name: Animal Bond
class_features.description: You can speak with and understand animals. Once per day, one animal will perform a simple task for you without any check required.

class_features.name: Woodland Form
class_features.description: Once per day, transform into any natural animal up to bear-sized for up to 1 hour. You retain your WIS score but otherwise use the animal's stats.

class_features.name: Nature's Sense
class_features.description: Advantage on all navigation, weather-reading, and plant or animal identification checks.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Your connection to nature grants you spellcasting. You know 2 tier 1 WIS spells at level 1, drawn from healing and nature themes. Metal armor disrupts this connection — you must wear only leather.

talents_table.effect: Woodland Form is now usable twice per day
+1 to WIS spellcasting checks
+1d6 HP
Animal Bond: up to three animals will perform tasks for you per day
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats
